title: collomia macrocalyx
intro: Collomia macrocalyx, also known as the Rocky Mountain collomia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Collomia macrocalyx include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Collomia macrocalyx can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and processing the plant material into a powder for later use.
